titles.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Musa Ibn Umar Ibn Bazi
Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Musa Ibn Umar Ibn Bazi

segments: ه عن موسى بن عمر بن بزيع فقد رويته عن محمّد بن عليّ ماجيلويه- رحمه اللّه- عن علي بن إبراهيم، عن أبيه، عن موسى بن عمر بن بزيع‌.
arabic.text: ه عن موسى بن عمر بن بزيع فقد رويته عن محمّد بن عليّ ماجيلويه- رحمه اللّه- عن علي بن إبراهيم، عن أبيه، عن موسى بن عمر بن بزيع‌.

segments: Everything in this book that is narrated from Musa ibn Umar ibn Bazi has been transmitted by me from Muhammad ibn Ali Majilawayh - may Allah (swt) have mercy on him - from Ali ibn Ibrahim, from his father, from Musa ibn Umar ibn Bazi.
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text: Everything in this book that is narrated from Musa ibn Umar ibn Bazi has been transmitted by me from Muhammad ibn Ali Majilawayh - may Allah (swt) have mercy on him - from Ali ibn Ibrahim, from his father, from Musa ibn Umar ibn Bazi.
